sub_modules.ifft16_bit_reverse_index: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used to load DIT input order.
sub_modules.ifft16_stage_address: Combinational radix-2 stage address generator for butterfly operand and twiddle indices.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup with FFT/IFFT sine sign selection.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with rounded Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.ifft16_output_scale: Combinational final output scaler that divides IFFT results by 16.
